title: AMV Rpg Mix - Linkin Park- Numb
description:
I know that the music has been used very often and that the games that I put as a source are old, but I did this stuff some years ago, but I hadn't a Youtube account. I found this file only recently and so I decided to upload it.
This video is a tribute to my favourite kind of games: the RPGs , the music is Numb by Linkin Park. The sources are: Final Fantasy VI, VII, VIII, IX, X and X-2, Xenogears, Suikoden III, Kingdom Hearts, Suikoden III and Wild Arms.
I do not own the rights, they belong to their rightful owners.
